creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: rakuco
Date: Sun May 10 20:25:59 UTC 2015
New revision: 386027
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/386027

Log:
  Update to 0.6.5 to fix CVE-2015-3146 (null pointer dereference).

  This release also fixed the bug in 0.6.4 that prevented the GCRYPT option
  from working.

  PR:		200106
  Approved by:	johans
  MFH:		2015Q2
  Security:	0b040e24-f751-11e4-b24d-5453ed2e2b49

  head/security/libssh/distinfo
  head/security/libssh/pkg-plist
